content.content: YouTuber who posts beauty, fashion, and lifestyle content to her channel AlexFashionBeauty. She created her channel in 2010, but did not begin posting videos to it until 2011. She has more than 190,000 subscribers to her YouTube channel, with another 190,000 followers on her Instagram account. She is from Quebec and her primary language is French. She has a brother named Francois. She welcomed her first child, a daughter named Novalie, with her fiance Samuel Fortier in 2018. LikeSierra Furtado, she is a Québécois YouTube beauty guru.
